description: NNDs with valid age at death
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) == "Neonatal Death" AND is.finite(age_at_death_days) & age_at_death_days >= 0 & age_at_admission <= 672 h

description: NNDs with missing/invalid age at death
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) == "Neonatal Death" AND NOT (is.finite(age_at_death_days) & age_at_death_days >= 0 & age_at_admission <= 672 h)

description: Total admissions with valid birthweight (LBW sample)

Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) == "Neonatal Death" AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg

description: Total admissions with valid SGA classification
Filter_notes: is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg AND !is.na(gestation) & gestation >= 24 wks & gestation <= 42 wks AND !is.na(sga_category)

normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) == "Neonatal Death" AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg AND !is.na(gestation) & gestation >= 24 wks & gestation <= 42 wks AND !is.na(sga_category)

description: Discarded for SGA (Missing both BW and GA)
